info.name: Batch
info.summary: Submit and monitor batch jobs on the ScienceData compute service
info.description: A web interface for the ScienceData GridFactory batch service. Compose a job from a template, pick input files from your ScienceData home, submit it, and monitor its progress and output — all from Nextcloud. The app authenticates you to the batch service server-side with your personal X.509 certificate, managed by files_sharding. A thin UI over the batch service (REST over mutual-TLS); job templates live in a folder in your files.
info.author: Frederik Orellana, DTU
